summary: Comprehensive backend + frontend testing of PoH fraud detection SaaS. 26/26 backend pytest tests pass (100%). Frontend UI loads correctly, all data-testid selectors present, login/overview/sessions/drawer/conversions/campaigns/rules/investigations/integrations/settings/logout flows all work with 0 JS page errors. One PRD deviation: new user registration lands on '/' instead of '/onboarding' as spec'd.

ui_bugs.issue: After successful registration, user is redirected to '/' (Executive Overview) instead of '/onboarding' as specified in PRD. The /onboarding route works correctly when navigated to directly (while authenticated).

design_issues.screen: Modals (New rule, Invite member, Session drawer)
issues: Radix DialogContent missing DialogTitle / aria-describedby — emits accessibility console warnings. Wrap title in VisuallyHidden or add explicit DialogTitle/DialogDescription for screen reader compliance.

action_items: Redirect new registrants to /onboarding (per PRD). Likely in /app/frontend/src/pages/auth/Register.jsx or AuthContext post-register navigation.
Add DialogTitle/DialogDescription (or VisuallyHidden) inside Radix DialogContent in New-Rule dialog, Invite-Member dialog, and SessionDrawer to silence a11y warnings.
critical_code_review_comments: Auth implementation is solid: bcrypt $2b$ hashing, httpOnly+secure+samesite=none cookies, brute-force lockout after 5 fails, refresh tokens, seed_admin idempotently updates demo password.
All endpoints exclude Mongo _id via projection ({_id: 0}) — good.

Scoring sanity verified: demo data has trusted (314) + suspicious (67) + fraudulent (81) sessions; fraudulent carry expected reason codes (browser_automation_detected, headless_browser_indicators, datacenter_ip_origin).
dashboard_routes.py is 514 lines — borderline; consider splitting into rules.py, integrations.py, workspace.py modules for maintainability.
SDK ingestion correctly returns 404 for invalid sdk_key and 200 with score+action for valid keys.
Integration connect/disconnect properly simulated (config: {demo: true}) and persisted in Mongo.
test_credentials: Demo owner: analyst@poh.io / PohDemo2026! (works). Use *@example.com for fresh registration tests — Pydantic EmailStr rejects *.test reserved TLD.
seed_data_creation: Did not create seed; used existing demo workspace 'Northwind Demand Gen' (462 sessions, 82 conversions, 4 fraud clusters, 5 integrations, audit logs). Tests created TEST_-prefixed rules, investigations, members which can be safely ignored or cleaned up.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test suite at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py covers all 26 critical paths and runs in ~5s. Frontend has comprehensive data-testid coverage (nav-*, kpi-*, range-*, filter-*, session-row-*, action-*, conversion-row-*, new-rule-button, rule-name/save/toggle-*/delete-*, cluster-*, investigate-*, integration-*, connect-*, disconnect-*, sensitivity-*, invite-*, sdk-snippet, send-test-event, load-sample-data, logout-button). Auth uses httpOnly cookies (samesite=none) — browser sessions don't persist across test runs by default. /api/auth/me also accepts Bearer header for curl/pytest.
rca_of_the_issue: Register->Overview redirect: probable cause is that Register.jsx (or AuthContext.register) navigates to '/' after success instead of '/onboarding'. Backend correctly creates workspace + SDK key on register; only the post-register frontend redirect needs to point to '/onboarding'.
